evals.prompt: The standards-and-spec review capability has already been activated. Review a bounded diff that changes session timeout parsing and report only defects supported by the stated contract or repository conventions.
evals.expected_output: Evidence-linked findings ordered by impact, each tied to a violated requirement or convention, with unsupported style preferences omitted.

evals.prompt: The standards-and-spec review capability has already been activated after a documentation generator change. Check correctness, compatibility, and missing verification evidence without redesigning the component.
evals.expected_output: A scoped review separating confirmed defects from verification gaps and noting when the diff satisfies the declared contract.
